name: Darksiders
description: Weathered gothic color — comic-book detail, post-apocalyptic grit, dramatic chiaroscuro with copper/bronze/charcoal palette and burnt-orange focal accents.
use_for: epic narrative covers, mythology and lore videos, character intros that need 'this matters' weight without the b&w of pure noir.

secondary.role: bronze / weathered-copper midtones on subject + environment

accent.role: burnt-orange single focal accent — molten metal, embers, eye glow

flux.positive_prefix: Painterly comic-book illustration in the spirit of weathered gothic fantasy concept art, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting with rim light from one side, charcoal-and-bronze color grading with a single burnt-orange focal accent (molten metal, embers, or rim glow), heavy surface texture: cracked stone, weathered leather, oxidized bronze, scarred skin. Hand-painted brush feel, not rendered. Post-apocalyptic atmosphere with airborne particulate.
flux.positive_suffix: Carbon shadows holding the dominant 60% of the frame. Avoid clean polished surfaces, prefer worn and scarred. Single subject in heroic asymmetric pose, weight planted, no static front-facing symmetry.

always_add: single dominant subject in asymmetric heroic pose, weight on one foot or planted weapon
single dramatic key light (warm) from one side, opposite side deep shadow
surface micro-detail: scars, weathered metal patina, cracked stone, leather wear, soot
atmospheric particulate (smoke, embers, dust) catching the rim light
single burnt-orange focal accent — limit color to charcoal/bronze/orange triad
